# Feature: Timeline Row Alignment (Slice 1)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-04 -->

## Intent

Track-Labels und Lane-Inhalte in der Structure Timeline sollen zeilenweise vertikal bündig sein (CapCut/FL-Studio-Stil). Slice 1 behebt den Film-Reihenfolge-Bug (Clip vs. Audio) und symmetrischen Audio-Section-Chrome, ohne Row-Pair-Refactor.

Roadmap: MVE Dialog Lane Layout — Follow-up Slice 1

## Preconditions

- Dev-Build mit QA-Route `#qa-timeline-row-alignment`
- Mindestens eine Dialog-Audio-Lane im Preview-Harness

## Happy Path

- [ ] Film-Label-Reihenfolge links = rechts: Shot → Audio → Clip → Musik → SFX
- [ ] Audio-Section-Header links und rechts haben gleiche Y-Position (Δ ≤ 2px)
- [ ] Dialog-Lane-Sidebar und Dialog-Lane-Content haben gleiche Y-Position pro `laneIndex` (Δ ≤ 2px)
- [ ] Vertikal scrollen über Label- oder Lane-Bereich bewegt beide Spalten synchron (bestehendes `verticalScrollRef`)

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Metronom-Button im Audio-Header (local profile): Scroll-Spalte behält gleiche Header-Höhe
- [ ] SFX-Footer-Button links: Scroll-Spalte Footer gleiche Höhe

## Regression

- [ ] Horizontaler Timeline-Scroll und Zoom unverändert
- [ ] Bestehende MVE-Dialog-Lane-Layout-Specs grün
- [ ] Hörspiel ohne Film-Zeilen: Beat/Akt/Scene-Labels weiter bündig mit Tracks

## Assumptions

- Row-Pair-Refactor (Slice 2) bewusst deferred
- Card-internes Scroll (Enhance-Panel) out of scope

## Implementation Notes

- Film label order: Clip label moved after `StructureTimelineAudioLaneLabels` in `StructureTimelineEditor.tsx` (Shot → Audio → Clip → Musik → SFX matches right column).
- Shared audio section chrome: `StructureTimelineAudioSectionChrome.tsx` — header/footer mirrored on scroll column (invisible duplicate controls preserve height).
- `StructureTimelineAudioLaneScrollRows` accepts `metronome` for symmetric header.
- `data-testid`: `audio-lane-sidebar-${laneIndex}`, `timeline-label-film-clip`, `timeline-audio-section-header-{labels|scroll}`.
- QA: `TimelineRowAlignmentPreviewPage.tsx`, route `#qa-timeline-row-alignment`, Playwright `.qa/runs/2026-07-04-timeline-row-alignment.spec.ts` (1/1 pass).
- Tauri live harness: `#qa-timeline-row-alignment-tauri` opens `test.scriptony`, runs `runTimelineRowAlignmentAudit`, shows PASS/FAIL — see `.qa/evidence/timeline-row-alignment/TAURI-MANUAL.md`.
- Row-pair epic draft: `.qa/design/timeline-row-pair-layout.md`, `.qa/intake/timeline-row-pair-layout-issues.md` (3 slices, DRAFT).
- Card-internal scroll (Enhance panel) out of scope.
